name: Fast Music Widget
description: A customizable Last.fm now-playing widget for OBS, XSplit, Streamlabs, and other streaming software.

name: Games
description: A collection of browser-based party games — Imposter, Password, Chain Reaction, Shade Signal, Location Signal, and Shikaku.

name: W3W Map
description: A static GTA V map viewer with What3Words grid overlay and postal code search.

name: FiveLaunch
description: A desktop launcher for FiveM that manages multiple isolated client profiles for mods, plugins, and settings.
